Item Name: Nutricost Pantry Organic Cassava Flour (1.5 Pound Bottle) Gluten Free, Non-GMO, Vegan Pure Powder For Baking, Cooking, Etc.
Bullet Point 1: Gluten-Free Goodness: Nutricost Pantry Organic Cassava Flour is a gluten-free alternative, catering to those with gluten sensitivities or those seeking a gluten-free lifestyle.
Bullet Point 2: Pure and Unflavored: Derived from pure cassava roots, this flour is unflavored, allowing it to seamlessly integrate into various recipes without altering the taste.
Bullet Point 3: Third-Party Tested: Rigorously tested by third-party labs for purity and potency, ensuring a high-quality product that you can trust for your culinary endeavors.
Bullet Point 4: Certified Organic: Achieving certifications from both CCOF and USDA Organic, this cassava flour meets stringent organic standards, providing you with a wholesome and organic option.
Bullet Point 5: Vegan and Non-GMO: Compliant with vegan dietary preferences and free from genetically modified organisms, this cassava flour aligns with various dietary choices, making it a versatile and inclusive ingredient for your cooking and baking needs.
Product Description: Nutricost Pantry Organic Cassava Flour is a versatile and high-quality gluten-free product, perfect for various culinary applications. Made from pure cassava roots, this flour is unflavored, ensuring a neutral taste that won't overpower your recipes. It undergoes rigorous third-party testing for purity and potency, ensuring a reliable and safe product. Additionally, it is CCOF and USDA certified organic, vegan, and non-GMO, making it a wholesome choice for your cooking and baking needs.
Value: 24.3
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Certified organic, gluten-free, and non-GMO flour positioned as a premium health-conscious baking ingredient. Transparent packaging and third-party testing indicate quality assurance. Mid-range pricing expected due to organic certification and niche dietary targeting.

catalog_content:
Item Name: LorAnn Strawberry SS Flavor, 1 dram bottle (.0125 fl oz - 3.7ml - 1 teaspoon)
Bullet Point 1: Strawberry flavoring is a long time favorite for lollipops and hard tack candy. For a sophisticated taste, try combining strawberry with our sparkling wine flavor. It's also wonderful with cake batter flavor - think strawberry shortcake.
Bullet Point 2: Strawberry flavoring is a long time favorite for lollipops and hard tack candy. For a sophisticated taste, try combining strawberry with our sparkling wine flavor. It's also wonderful with cake batter flavor - think strawberry shortcake.
Bullet Point 3: A little goes a long way! LorAnn’s super strength flavors are three to four times the strength of typical baking extracts.
Bullet Point 4: A Dram is a small bottle that is the perfect size for 1 batch of homemade Hard Tack Candy (.125 fl oz approximately 1 teaspoon) Love the flavor and need a larger size? Most of the 100+ Super Strength flavors are availble in larger sizes. 1 ounce bottle contains approximately 6 teaspoons. -- 4 ounce bottle contains approximately 24 teaspoons -- 16 ounce and gallon are also available.
Bullet Point 5: Typical uses: hard candy, general candy making, cakes, cookies, frosting, ice cream and a wide variety of other baking and confectionery applications. Note: When substituting super strength flavors for extracts, use ¼ to ½ teaspoon for 1 teaspoon of extract.
Bullet Point 6: Kosher - Gluten Free - Made in USA
Product Description: Quality - LorAnn a Family Tradition Since 1962
Value: 1.0
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Specialty food-grade flavoring for baking and confectionery, positioned as a high-strength extract alternative. Small 1 dram bottle suggests niche use for home candy makers or small-batch production. No premium branding or organic claims, but 'super strength' implies concentrated value. Pricing likely reflects niche market demand rather than commodity pricing.
